description.ko: 유기적 연결성을 깊이 탐구하며, 생체 발광하는 살아있는 네트워크의 호흡 리듬을 포착합니다.
description.en: A deep exploration of organic connectivity, capturing the breathing rhythm of a bioluminescent living network.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Mycelial Pulse.' A complex, breathing organic network composed of #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular filaments. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere, exhaling thick, viscous ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that flow like rhythmic liquid silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro focus on the intricate internal capillary systems and glowing sap channels. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
